case_for: Ertz has shown week-to-week upside with three games at or above 14 points in his last six, including an 18.7-point outburst in week 11 that matches his projection, suggesting he can clear 12.0 when featured in the gameplan.
case_against: His floor is alarmingly low with a 1.5-point dud in week 9 and just 7.1 in week 10, showing volatile target share that could easily produce another sub-12 outcome.
